reasoning: We need to address your poor lactate clearance and low fatigue resistance. Given your extended rest and last ride session, we will focus on controlled lactate production and clearance, simulating the demands of the Alpine Loop's key segment. This will enhance your aerobic base and ability to sustain efforts during the climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 5 x (6 min @ 242-256W, 3 min @ 201-218W) to promote lactate clearance at various intensities

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
